{{CargoRelic
|name=Travel Track
|class_id=20226
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Time traveling is essentially the hopping from one timeline to a parallel timeline. To avoid falling into time storms, one must designate a temporo-spatial beacon in the target timeline.
|fame=14
|art=19
|fth=28
|civ=16
|tech=15
|ss1=Per Super Memetic Chest opened:<br>> Snail ATK +6<br>Super Memetic Chests Opened: 20/20
|ss2=Per Super Memetic Chest opened:<br>> Snail ATK +12<br>Super Memetic Chests Opened: 20/20
|ss3=Per Super Memetic Chest opened:<br>> Snail ATK +18<br>Super Memetic Chests Opened: 20/20
|ss4=Per Super Memetic Chest opened:<br>> Snail ATK +18<br>Super Memetic Chests Opened: 20/20
|ss7=Per Super Memetic Chest opened:<br>> Snail ATK +18<br>Super Memetic Chests Opened: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
